---
title: "High-Risk HPV and Anal Cancer amongst IBD Patients"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    toc-depth: 3
    toc-location: right
    echo: false
    css: styles/tables.css
    embed-resources: true
    self-contained-math: true
---


# Increased Prevalence of High-Risk HPV+ DNA of Rectal cells in IBD Patients
